title: Unicorn Commandos
description: Gentle loving unicorns take a drink at a magic stream and are transformed into super soldiers. Now, they protect the land from their battle corral.
altHero: five colorful unicorns with body armor
alt2: Sergeant Stampede’s horn glittering and glowing
alt3: a unicorn horn pointed at an explosion in the sky
alt4: Neighpalm in front of a huge explosion cloud
